top_signals.title: Cheap AI could derail OpenAI and Anthropic's IPOs

top_signals.title: Zuckerberg says 'success isn't a given' in memo to employees amid Meta layoffs
top_signals.summary: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs affecting about 10% of the company's workforce, equating to roughly 8,000 jobs.
